competency_framework.description: This certification validates the ability to effectively utilize Microsoft 365 Copilot and its integrated applications to enhance productivity, communication, data analysis, and prompting best practices.

domains.name: Productivity Tools
domains.description: Covers the use of Microsoft 365 applications like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint with Copilot to enhance productivity.

skills.name: Word with Copilot
skills.description: Utilize Copilot to draft, edit, and format documents efficiently.
proficiency_levels: Novice: Can use basic Copilot features to draft documents.
Competent: Can leverage Copilot for advanced editing and formatting.
Expert: Can customize Copilot prompts for specific document needs.

skills.name: Excel with Copilot
skills.description: Employ Copilot to analyze data, create formulas, and generate reports.
proficiency_levels: Novice: Can use Copilot for basic data entry and formula creation.
Competent: Can utilize Copilot for data analysis and visualization.
Expert: Can automate complex data tasks using Copilot.

skills.name: PowerPoint with Copilot
skills.description: Use Copilot to design presentations and enhance visual storytelling.
proficiency_levels: Novice: Can create simple presentations with Copilot assistance.
Competent: Can design engaging presentations using advanced Copilot features.
Expert: Can integrate multimedia and interactive elements with Copilot.

domains.name: Communication Tools
domains.description: Focuses on using Microsoft Teams and Outlook with Copilot to improve communication and collaboration.

skills.name: Teams with Copilot
skills.description: Enhance team collaboration and communication using Copilot features.
proficiency_levels: Novice: Can use Copilot for basic messaging and meeting scheduling.
Competent: Can manage team projects and communications with Copilot.
Expert: Can customize Copilot for complex team workflows.

skills.name: Outlook with Copilot
skills.description: Optimize email management and scheduling with Copilot.
proficiency_levels: Novice: Can use Copilot for basic email drafting and scheduling.
Competent: Can organize and prioritize communications using Copilot.
Expert: Can automate email workflows and integrate with other tools using Copilot.

domains.name: Data Analysis
domains.description: Involves using Copilot for advanced data analysis and insights generation.

skills.name: Data Insights with Copilot
skills.description: Generate and interpret data insights using Copilot's advanced reasoning capabilities.
proficiency_levels: Novice: Can generate basic insights from data using Copilot.
Competent: Can perform detailed data analysis and visualization with Copilot.
Expert: Can develop custom data models and insights using Copilot.

skills.name: Integration with Data Sources
skills.description: Connect and analyze data from various sources using Copilot.
proficiency_levels: Novice: Can connect basic data sources to Copilot.
Competent: Can integrate multiple data sources for comprehensive analysis.
Expert: Can customize data integration and analysis workflows with Copilot.

domains.name: Prompting Best Practices
domains.description: Covers the development of effective prompts to maximize Copilot's capabilities.

skills.name: Prompt Design
skills.description: Create effective prompts to guide Copilot in generating desired outputs.
proficiency_levels: Novice: Can use basic prompts to interact with Copilot.
Competent: Can design prompts for specific tasks and outputs.
Expert: Can optimize and customize prompts for complex scenarios.

skills.name: Prompt Optimization
skills.description: Refine and optimize prompts for efficiency and accuracy.
proficiency_levels: Novice: Can identify basic prompt improvements.
Competent: Can refine prompts for better performance and accuracy.
Expert: Can develop advanced prompt strategies for complex tasks.

assessments.title: Drafting and Formatting a Business Proposal in Word with Copilot
assessments.scenario: You are a project manager at a tech company tasked with drafting a business proposal for a new client. The proposal needs to be well-structured, professionally formatted, and include specific sections such as an executive summary, project timeline, and budget overview.
assessments.instructions: Use Microsoft Word with Copilot to draft a comprehensive business proposal. Start by outlining the key sections of the proposal. Use Copilot to assist in drafting the content for each section, ensuring clarity and professionalism. Leverage Copilot's formatting capabilities to ensure the document is visually appealing and adheres to company standards. Customize Copilot prompts to refine the document's tone and style as needed.
expected_outputs: A complete business proposal document with all required sections.
Properly formatted text with headings, bullet points, and tables where necessary.
Consistent tone and style throughout the document.

assessments.title: Managing a Team Project in Microsoft Teams with Copilot
assessments.scenario: You are leading a cross-functional team working on a product launch. Effective communication and collaboration are crucial to ensure the project stays on track.
assessments.instructions: Use Microsoft Teams with Copilot to set up a project management hub. Create channels for different aspects of the project (e.g., marketing, development, logistics). Schedule regular meetings using Copilot and ensure all team members are informed and prepared. Utilize Copilot to assist in tracking project progress, assigning tasks, and managing deadlines. Customize Copilot to automate routine updates and reminders for the team.
expected_outputs: A structured Teams environment with channels for each project aspect.
Scheduled meetings with agendas and participant lists.
Task assignments and deadlines managed through Teams.
Automated updates and reminders set up using Copilot.

assessments.title: Generating Data Insights for Quarterly Sales Report with Copilot
assessments.scenario: You are a data analyst tasked with preparing a quarterly sales report for the executive team. The report should highlight key trends, insights, and recommendations based on the sales data.
assessments.instructions: Use Excel with Copilot to analyze the provided sales data. Generate visualizations such as charts and graphs to represent key trends. Use Copilot to assist in identifying significant patterns and insights from the data. Prepare a summary of findings and recommendations for the executive team, ensuring the report is clear and actionable.
expected_outputs: An Excel workbook with data visualizations (charts, graphs).
A summary of key insights and trends identified from the data.
Recommendations based on the data analysis.
assessments.competency_ref: Data Analysis - Data Insights with Copilot

assessments.title: Designing Effective Prompts for Copilot in a Marketing Campaign
assessments.scenario: You are a marketing specialist designing a new campaign for a product launch. You need to create effective prompts for Copilot to generate creative content and strategies.
assessments.instructions: Develop a series of prompts to guide Copilot in generating marketing content for the campaign. The prompts should cover various aspects such as social media posts, email newsletters, and ad copy. Test the prompts to ensure they produce relevant and creative outputs. Refine the prompts based on the initial results to optimize content quality and alignment with campaign goals.
expected_outputs: A set of well-designed prompts for different marketing content types.
Generated content samples for social media, email, and ads.
Refined prompts based on testing and feedback.

rubrics.assessment_ref: Drafting and Formatting a Business Proposal in Word with Copilot

criteria.novice: The proposal is missing several key sections and lacks a coherent structure.
criteria.competent: The proposal includes most required sections with a logical structure, but some sections may lack depth.
criteria.expert: The proposal is comprehensive, including all required sections with detailed and well-organized content.

criteria.novice: The document is poorly formatted with inconsistent use of headings and bullet points.
criteria.competent: The document is generally well-formatted with appropriate use of headings and bullet points, but may have minor inconsistencies.
criteria.expert: The document is professionally formatted with consistent and appropriate use of headings, bullet points, and tables, enhancing readability.

criteria.novice: The tone and style of the document are inconsistent and unprofessional.
criteria.competent: The document maintains a generally consistent tone and style, with minor lapses.
criteria.expert: The document exhibits a consistent and professional tone and style throughout, tailored to the audience.

rubrics.assessment_ref: Managing a Team Project in Microsoft Teams with Copilot

criteria.novice: The Teams environment is poorly organized with missing or irrelevant channels.
criteria.competent: The Teams environment is adequately organized with relevant channels for most project aspects.
criteria.expert: The Teams environment is well-structured with comprehensive channels covering all project aspects.

criteria.novice: Meetings are irregularly scheduled with incomplete agendas and participant lists.
criteria.competent: Meetings are regularly scheduled with agendas and participant lists, but may lack detail.
criteria.expert: Meetings are systematically scheduled with detailed agendas and complete participant lists, ensuring preparedness.

criteria.novice: Tasks and deadlines are poorly managed, leading to confusion and missed deadlines.
criteria.competent: Tasks and deadlines are generally managed, but may occasionally lack clarity or timeliness.
criteria.expert: Tasks and deadlines are effectively managed with clear assignments and timely updates, ensuring project progress.

criteria.novice: Automated updates and reminders are rarely used or ineffective.
criteria.competent: Automated updates and reminders are used, but may not fully optimize team communication.
criteria.expert: Automated updates and reminders are effectively set up, enhancing team communication and efficiency.

rubrics.assessment_ref: Generating Data Insights for Quarterly Sales Report with Copilot

criteria.novice: Visualizations are unclear or poorly represent the data trends.
criteria.competent: Visualizations adequately represent data trends, but may lack clarity or detail.
criteria.expert: Visualizations are clear, detailed, and effectively highlight key data trends.

criteria.novice: Few insights are identified, and they lack significance or relevance.
criteria.competent: Several relevant insights are identified, but some may lack depth or clarity.
criteria.expert: Significant and relevant insights are clearly identified, providing valuable understanding of the data.

criteria.novice: Recommendations are vague or not actionable.
criteria.competent: Recommendations are generally actionable, but may lack specificity or alignment with insights.
criteria.expert: Recommendations are clear, specific, and directly aligned with the insights, providing actionable guidance.

rubrics.assessment_ref: Designing Effective Prompts for Copilot in a Marketing Campaign

criteria.novice: Prompts are poorly designed, leading to irrelevant or low-quality outputs.
criteria.competent: Prompts are adequately designed, producing generally relevant outputs, but may lack creativity.
criteria.expert: Prompts are well-designed, producing highly relevant and creative outputs aligned with campaign goals.

criteria.novice: Generated content is irrelevant or lacks creativity and alignment with campaign goals.
criteria.competent: Generated content is generally relevant and creative, but may not fully align with campaign goals.
criteria.expert: Generated content is highly relevant, creative, and well-aligned with campaign goals.

criteria.novice: Prompts are rarely refined, resulting in minimal improvement in content quality.
criteria.competent: Prompts are refined based on feedback, leading to some improvement in content quality.
criteria.expert: Prompts are systematically refined based on testing and feedback, significantly enhancing content quality and alignment.

item_bank.stem: Using Microsoft Word with Copilot, draft a professional business proposal for a new project. Ensure that the document is well-structured, includes an executive summary, project objectives, and a budget overview. Use Copilot to enhance the formatting and clarity of the document.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should be a well-structured business proposal with clear sections, enhanced formatting, and improved clarity using Copilot's features.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the structure, clarity, and formatting of the document. Check for the effective use of Copilot in enhancing these aspects.

item_bank.stem: Analyze a dataset in Excel using Copilot to identify trends and generate a report. The dataset includes sales figures over the past year. Use Copilot to create visualizations that highlight key insights.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should include a report with identified trends and visualizations such as charts or graphs that highlight key sales insights.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Assess the accuracy of the trend analysis and the effectiveness of the visualizations. Check for the use of Copilot in generating these insights.

item_bank.stem: Design a PowerPoint presentation using Copilot to showcase a new marketing strategy. Include multimedia elements and ensure the presentation is engaging and visually appealing.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The presentation should be engaging, with multimedia elements and a clear, visually appealing design, enhanced by Copilot's features.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the engagement level, design quality, and use of multimedia. Check for Copilot's role in enhancing these elements.

item_bank.stem: In Microsoft Teams, use Copilot to set up a project management workflow for a team of 10 members. Include task assignments, deadlines, and communication channels.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The workflow should include clear task assignments, deadlines, and communication channels, effectively set up using Copilot.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Assess the clarity and organization of the workflow. Check for the effective use of Copilot in setting up the project management system.

item_bank.stem: Optimize your email management in Outlook using Copilot. Organize your inbox, prioritize emails, and set up a scheduling system for meetings.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The inbox should be well-organized, with prioritized emails and an efficient scheduling system for meetings, all set up using Copilot.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the organization and prioritization of emails and the efficiency of the scheduling system. Check for Copilot's role in these tasks.

item_bank.stem: Using Copilot, generate insights from a dataset containing customer feedback. Identify key themes and suggest actionable improvements for customer service.
item_bank.competency_ref: Data Analysis: Data Insights with Copilot
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should include identified key themes from the feedback and actionable improvements for customer service, generated using Copilot.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Assess the accuracy and relevance of the identified themes and suggested improvements. Check for Copilot's contribution to the analysis.

item_bank.stem: Integrate data from multiple sources using Copilot to perform a comprehensive analysis of market trends. Use the integrated data to create a detailed report.
item_bank.competency_ref: Data Analysis: Integration with Data Sources
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should include a detailed report based on a comprehensive analysis of market trends, using data integrated from multiple sources with Copilot.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the comprehensiveness and accuracy of the analysis and report. Check for the effective use of Copilot in data integration.

item_bank.stem: Design a prompt for Copilot to generate a detailed project timeline for a product launch. Ensure the prompt is specific enough to guide Copilot in creating an accurate and useful timeline.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The prompt should be specific and detailed, guiding Copilot to generate an accurate and useful project timeline for a product launch.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Assess the specificity and clarity of the prompt. Check if it effectively guides Copilot to produce the desired output.

item_bank.stem: Refine an existing prompt used in Copilot to improve its efficiency and accuracy in generating monthly sales reports. Describe the changes made and their impact.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should describe specific changes made to the prompt and how these changes improved its efficiency and accuracy in generating sales reports.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the effectiveness of the changes in improving prompt performance. Check for a clear explanation of the impact of these changes.

item_bank.stem: Create a custom Copilot agent to assist with data entry tasks in Excel. Describe the agent's capabilities and how it improves efficiency.
item_bank.competency_ref: Data Analysis: Integration with Data Sources
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should describe a custom Copilot agent with capabilities that assist with data entry tasks, improving efficiency in Excel.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Assess the capabilities and efficiency improvements of the custom agent. Check for a clear description of how the agent enhances data entry tasks.

blueprint.target_audience: Professionals and students who use Microsoft 365 applications and want to enhance their productivity and collaboration skills with Copilot.
blueprint.prerequisites: Candidates should have a basic understanding of Microsoft 365 applications such as Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, and Outlook. Familiarity with data analysis concepts and digital communication tools is recommended.
blueprint.program_overview:
The Microsoft 365 Copilot User Certification is designed to empower users with the skills needed to leverage Microsoft 365 Copilot and its integrated applications effectively. This certification focuses on enhancing productivity, communication, and data analysis capabilities through the use of Copilot, a powerful AI-driven tool. Participants will learn to utilize Copilot to draft, edit, and format documents, analyze data, and create engaging presentations. Additionally, the program covers optimizing communication and collaboration using Microsoft Teams and Outlook with Copilot.

The certification program is structured around four key domains: Productivity Tools, Communication Tools, Data Analysis, and Prompting Best Practices. Each domain is crafted to build proficiency from novice to expert levels, ensuring that candidates can apply their skills in real-world scenarios. By completing this certification, users will be equipped to maximize the potential of Microsoft 365 applications, driving efficiency and innovation in their professional environments.
domain_summary: Productivity Tools: Focuses on using Microsoft 365 applications like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint with Copilot to enhance productivity.
Communication Tools: Enhances communication and collaboration using Microsoft Teams and Outlook with Copilot.
Data Analysis: Involves using Copilot for advanced data analysis and insights generation.
Prompting Best Practices: Covers the development of effective prompts to maximize Copilot's capabilities.
blueprint.assessment_strategy: The assessment strategy for the Microsoft 365 Copilot User Certification is performance-based, emphasizing real-world application over theoretical knowledge. Candidates will be evaluated through practical tasks that simulate actual workplace scenarios, requiring them to demonstrate their ability to use Copilot effectively across various Microsoft 365 applications. This approach ensures that certified individuals possess the competence to apply their skills in enhancing productivity, communication, and data analysis in their professional roles. The assessments are designed to test proficiency at different levels, from novice to expert, across all domains, ensuring a comprehensive evaluation of the candidate's capabilities.
blueprint.renewal_cadence: The certification is recommended to be renewed every two years. This interval ensures that certified users remain up-to-date with the latest features and best practices of Microsoft 365 Copilot, reflecting the rapid advancements in AI and productivity tools.
